h1.visual_description: Bold, serif font, larger than body text, left-aligned, used for major sections.

h2.visual_description: Bold, serif font, same size as body text, used for sub-sections within the flow.

visual_matchers.pattern: Bold text at the start of a column or after a vertical break
Hanging indent with author names followed by a year
Italicized text within a reference block

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: No headers, footers, or page numbers are visible in this specific page segment.
